description_long: This is an adult pedestrian with shoulder-length hair, standing with arms extended horizontally. The individual is dressed in a casual short-sleeve t-shirt featuring a colorful graphic on the front and text on the back, paired with loose-fitting pants and athletic sneakers. The t-shirt appears slightly oversized and the pants are relaxed, suggesting a comfortable, everyday style suitable for urban environments. The figure's posture is upright and symmetrical, with both feet flat on the ground and arms outstretched. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall build is average. The surface of the clothing and shoes appears matte and soft, typical of fabric and rubber materials.
description: An adult pedestrian in casual attire with a graphic t-shirt, loose pants, and sneakers, standing upright with arms extended. The figure has shoulder-length hair and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the graphic t-shirt, facial features, and both arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, arm, and the relaxed fit of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the t-shirt with text, hair length, and both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the pants.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve t-shirt and loose-fitting pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
